deeperExplanation: In production systems, TS Compilation Flow enables modular software architectures, clear scope separation, and efficient resource allocation.
internalImplementation: The TypeScript execution engine compiles and optimizes TS Compilation Flow by managing evaluation frames and symbol resolution on the call stack.
